info.title: Quick Scraper API
info.description: Quick Scraper API handles proxy servers, browsers, and CAPTCHA so that you can get the HTML from any website with an easy API call. Supports JavaScript rendering, custom headers, geographic location targeting, premium residential proxies, device type selection, and parser addons.

get.description: Fetch the raw HTML content of any URL. Supports JavaScript rendering, custom headers, geographic targeting, device type emulation, premium residential proxies, and parser addons. Each request is retried until completed (up to 60 seconds). Limit is 2MB per request.

parameters.name: render
parameters.description: Set to true to render JavaScript using a headless Chrome instance (paid plans only)

parameters.name: keep_headers
parameters.description: Set to true to pass through original request headers (user agents, cookies, etc.)

parameters.name: country_code
parameters.description: Geographic location for the request. Supported: us, ca, gb, de, fr, es, br, mx, in, jp, cn, au, it, nl, sg. Enterprise plans support additional countries.

parameters.name: premium
parameters.description: Set to true to use premium residential proxy pools

parameters.name: parser
parameters.description: Parser addon to apply to the response for structured data extraction

200.description: Successfully scraped the URL. Returns raw HTML content of the page.

schema.description: Raw HTML content of the scraped page

400.description: Bad request - invalid URL or parameters

403.description: Forbidden - free plan limit exceeded (1,000 requests)

429.description: Too many requests - concurrent connection limit exceeded

500.description: Internal server error - all retry attempts failed within 60 seconds

apiKeyQuery.name: access_token
apiKeyQuery.description: API access token passed as query parameter
